name: @tomsawyerlabs/ui
description: Tom Sawyer Labs shared design system: interactive gradient background, base styling, logo, and layout shell.

scripts.build: bun run generate && tsdown src/index.ts --format esm --clean --external react --external react-dom --external react/jsx-runtime && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --outDir dist --noEmit false
scripts.dev: bun run generate && tsdown src/index.ts --format esm --dts --watch --external react --external react-dom --external react/jsx-runtime
